item.title: [COLOR orchid]¤[/COLOR] [B][COLOR orange]BOXING HD REPLAYS SCRAPER[/COLOR] [COLOR orchid] (WP)[/COLOR][/B] [COLOR orchid]¤[/COLOR]

regex.name: makelist
regex.expres:
#$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data, Cookie_Jar, m, url=''): from resources.lib.modules import client, control import re, html if control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') != 'plugin.video.thecrew': return base = 'https://watchprowrestlings.live/categorys/boxing/' results = [] for page in range(1, 6): page_url = base if page == 1 else f'{base}page/{page}/' data = client.request(page_url) if not data: break cards = re.findall( r'
.*?' r']*>.*?' r'

([^<]+)', data, re.S ) if not cards: break for thumb, link, title in cards: title = html.unescape(title).strip() results.append((link, thumb, title)) return results

regex.name: playurl

item.title: [COLOR orchid]¤[/COLOR] [B][COLOR orange]UFC/MMA HD REPLAYS SCRAPER[/COLOR] [COLOR orchid] (WP)[/COLOR][/B] [COLOR orchid]¤[/COLOR]

regex.expres:

.*?' r']*>.*?' r'

([^<]+)', data, re.S ) if not cards: break for thumb, link, title in cards: title = html.unescape(title).strip() results.append((link, thumb, title)) return results

regex.name: playurl

item.name: [COLOR orchid]¤[/COLOR] [B][COLOR white]WWE RAW[/COLOR] [COLOR orchid]DIRECT REPLAYS[/COLOR][/B] [COLOR orchid]¤[/COLOR]

regex.name: dir
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = 'https://thechains24.com/GREENHAT/WWE%20Monday%20Night%20Raw.xml'): from resources.lib.modules import control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return from resources.lib.indexers import lists lists.indexer().get(url)
